articles.title: Equality before law
articles.body_text: The State shall not deny to any person equality before the law or the equal protection of the laws within the territory of India.

articles.title: Prohibition of discrimination on grounds of religion, race, caste, sex or place of birth
articles.body_text: (1) The State shall not discriminate against any citizen on grounds only of religion, race, caste, sex, place of birth or any of them.

articles.title: Protection of certain rights regarding freedom of speech, etc.
articles.body_text:
(1) All citizens shall have the right—
(a) to freedom of speech and expression;

articles.title: Protection in respect of conviction for offences
articles.body_text: (1) No person shall be convicted of any offence except for violation of a law in force.

articles.title: Protection of life and personal liberty
articles.body_text: No person shall be deprived of his life or personal liberty except according to procedure established by law.
